also_known_as: マチルダ・デ・アンジェリス
マチルダデアンジェリス
biography:
Matilda De Angelis (born September 11, 1995) is an Italian actress and singer. Her films include Italian Race (2016), Rose Island (2020), and Dracula: A Love Tale (2025).

On television, she is known for her roles in the Netflix series The Law According to Lidia Poët (2023–2024), the HBO miniseries The Undoing (2020), and the Amazon miniseries Citadel: Diana (2024).
name: Matilda De Angelis
